# Muhammed Haroon

> Muhammed Haroon is an independent engineer and open-source contributor building reliable AI systems, developer tools, and infrastructure products.

Canonical site: https://haroon0x.onrender.com/

## Core pages

- [Portfolio](https://haroon0x.onrender.com/): Selected systems, engineering work, background, and contact information.
- [Writing](https://haroon0x.onrender.com/blog): Technical essays and build notes. No entries are published yet.
- [Open-source contributions](https://haroon0x.onrender.com/pull-requests): Public pull-request record across infrastructure, developer tools, machine learning, and AI systems.

## Selected systems

- [Wake AI](https://github.com/haroon0x/Wake-ai): Private, searchable AI memory for Android with on-device text storage, local embeddings, and cited retrieval.
- [DeadDrop](https://github.com/haroon0x/DeadDrop): Local-first coding task inbox with an outbound-only worker and human-reviewed diff receipts.
- [OutSync](https://github.com/haroon0x/OutSync): Reliable database event delivery using the transactional outbox pattern, Kafka, FastAPI, and PostgreSQL.
